author: Sergey Pekarchik
angelblock.rendelithic_armor.desc1: §f§lPurpose:§r§7 Nether. Good protection, a wide range of abilities, but low durability
angelblock.rendelithic_armor.desc3: §f§lTraits:§r§7 Wearing the full Rendelite set provides complete protection against fire and lava. Chance to fall through Ice (jumping does not affect the probability)
angelblock.rendelithic_armor.desc8: Burns, slows down, or highlights attackers: -
angelblock.rendelithic_armor.desc10: Armor protection depends on durability. Fully broken armor stays but loses all its positive effects
angelblock.diamithic_armor.desc1: §f§lPurpose:§r§7 For boss fights, a versatile armor. Excellent protection, decent functionality. Heavy
angelblock.diamithic_armor.desc2: §f§lWeaknesses:§r§7 bites from spiders, silverfish, or bees §o(double damage)
angelblock.diamithic_armor.desc3: §f§lTraits:§r§7 Grants full protection against lightning strikes. Slows down the player. Chance to fall through Ice and Netherrack (Netherrack affected by jumping only). Slow Falling prevents falling, but only when jumping
angelblock.diamithic_armor.desc8: Burns, slows down, or highlights attackers: -
angelblock.diamithic_armor.desc10: Armor protection depends on durability. Fully broken armor stays but loses all its positive effects
angelblock.lapis_armor.desc1: §f§lPurpose:§r§7 Designed for underwater survival. Good protection. Sensitive to extreme temperatures
angelblock.lapis_armor.desc2: §f§lWeaknesses:§r§7 fire, magma, and lava: +20% damage; freezing: +100% damage
angelblock.lapis_armor.desc3: §f§lTraits:§r§7 Contact with fire or magma applies Wither effect for 30 sec
angelblock.lapis_armor.desc8: Burns, slows down, or highlights attackers: -
angelblock.lapis_armor.desc10: Armor protection depends on durability. Fully broken armor stays but loses all its positive effects
angelblock.lapis_armor.desc11: Chance to spawn a rare axolotl increases to 1/100 if a player or mob in full set of Aquarite Armor is within 8 blocks
angelblock.lapis_armor.desc12: Luck may prevent death (25% chance per level), teleporting to saved respawn point with regen and damage protection
angelblock.limonite_armor.desc1: §f§lPurpose:§r§7 Universal armor. Moderate protection, average durability, wide range of abilities. Suitable for forests, jungles, snowy biomes, mountains, and caves
angelblock.limonite_armor.desc2: §f§lWeaknesses:§r§7 Wither, Wind Charge, and explosions: +50% damage
angelblock.limonite_armor.desc3: §f§lTraits:§r§7 Restores health under rain. 80% bite protection (spiders, silverfish, bees). 100% freezing protection. Invisible to creepers beyond 3 blocks
angelblock.limonite_armor.desc8: Burns, slows down, or highlights attackers: +
angelblock.limonite_armor.desc10: Armor protection depends on durability. Fully broken armor stays but loses all its positive effects
angelblock.limonite_armor.desc11: Slows nearby attackers; ignites distant ones
angelblock.limonite_armor.desc12: Luck may prevent death (25% chance per level), teleporting to saved respawn point with regen and damage protection
angelblock.super_armor.desc1: §f§lPurpose:§r§7 Replaces any armor by combining all its advantages. The best choice for boss fights and as a universal set
angelblock.super_armor.desc2: §f§lWeaknesses:§r§7 Normal visibility to creepers (unlike Lymonite armor)
angelblock.super_armor.desc3: §f§lTraits:§r§7 Restores health under rain. 80% bite protection (spiders, silverfish, bees). 100% freezing protection
angelblock.super_armor.desc6: Fire and lava protection: + (100% fire, 95% lava)
angelblock.super_armor.desc8: Burns, slows down, or highlights attackers: +
angelblock.super_armor.desc10: Armor protection depends on durability. Fully broken armor stays but loses all its positive effects
angelblock.super_armor.desc11: Slows nearby attackers; ignites distant ones
angelblock.super_armor.desc12: When the player is standing on the ground, activating Slow Fall together with Jump Boost grants the Levitation effect. Reactivating Slow Fall disables Levitation
angelblock.super_armor.desc13: Super Jump activates on a second jump within 1 second after the first. The first jump is normal, allowing you to clear low obstacles without triggering the Super Jump.
angelblock.super_armor.desc14: Luck may prevent death (25% chance per level), teleporting to saved respawn point with regen and damage protection
angelblock.flying_armor.desc1: §f§lPurpose:§r§7 Flight and fast travel. Very low protection and durability. Cannot be enchanted
angelblock.flying_armor.desc3: §f§lTraits:§r§7 Can't fly in the Nether, in rain, or if chestplate durability is below 50%. Fireworks cannot be used for speed boost
angelblock.flying_armor.desc8: Burns, slows down, or highlights attackers: -
angelblock.flying_armor.desc10: Armor protection depends on durability. Fully broken armor stays but loses all its positive effects
angelblock.flying_armor.desc11: Flight is only possible when wearing the full armor set

item.angelblock.diamithic_sword.desc2: Explosion Mode ON: creates a single explosion at the attack point
item.angelblock.diamithic_sword.desc4: Explosion Mode ON: creates multiple explosions at the target point
item.angelblock.diamithic_sword.desc5: Deals 60% damage when durability is below 1/3, 40% damage when durability is below 1/5. At 0 durability, it does not break but stops dealing damage
item.angelblock.diamithic_sword.desc6: Using effects (right-click) drains the player, but not regular attacks

item.angelblock.planter.desc4: Plants or fertilizes the most of plants towards the player direction
item.angelblock.planter.desc5: Second hand: seeds, planting stocks, bone meal (to fertilize), shears (to clear grass)
item.angelblock.planter.desc6: Can be crafted or given by a farmer as a gift (1/10 chance) when player has the 'Hero of the Village' status

item.angelblock.track_layer.desc5: Second hand: any rails, redstone wire, fences, walls
item.angelblock.track_layer.desc7: Using the rod drains the player. At 0 durability, the rod does not break but loses its abilities
item.angelblock.builder.desc3: Places blocks a player holds in second hand towards the player direction
item.angelblock.builder.desc5: Blocks are placed to a cube 3x3x3 with an empty space in the center (to use a destroying potion)
item.angelblock.builder.desc6: Second hand: any non-falling solid blocks that are not entities
item.angelblock.builder.desc8: Using the rod drains the player. At 0 durability, the rod does not break but loses its abilities

item.angelblock.diamithic_tool_upgrade_k: Can be found in villages and Strongholds
Can be given by a weaponsmith or a toolsmith as a gift (1/8 chance) when player has the 'Hero of the Village' status
item.angelblock.lapis_tool_upgrade_kit.d: Can be found in villages and Underwater Ruins
Can be given by a weaponsmith or a toolsmith as a gift (1/8 chance) when player has the 'Hero of the Village' status
item.angelblock.limonite_tool_upgrade_ki: Can be found in villages, Woodland Mansions and Jungle Temples
Can be given by a weaponsmith or a toolsmith as a gift (1/8 chance) when player has the 'Hero of the Village' status
item.angelblock.super_tool_upgrade_kit.d: Can be found in Buried Treasures
Can be given by a weaponsmith or a toolsmith as a gift (1/8 chance) when player has the 'Hero of the Village' status
item.angelblock.diamond_tool_upgrade_kit: Can be found in villages and at Ruined Portals
item.angelblock.rod_upgrade_kit.desc2: Can be found in Suspicious Blocks at Desert Pyramids and Desert Wells
item.angelblock.rod_upgrade_kit.desc3: Can be given by a cleric as a gift (1/11 chance) when player has the 'Hero of the Village' status
item.angelblock.downgrade_kit.desc2: When removing upgrades, one item must be taken manually, while the rest are returned to the inventory
item.angelblock.obsidian_powder.desc: Can be got from Cracked Obsidian
item.angelblock.endstone_powder.desc1: Turns Lava source into End Stone
item.angelblock.endstone_powder.desc2: Can be got from Cracked End Stone
item.angelblock.diamond_powder.desc: Can be got by breaking Diamond Blocks with Splash Destroying Potion
item.angelblock.saltpeter.desc: Can be got by breaking Tuff by Splash Destroying Potion or by End Rod
item.angelblock.energy_fiber.desc: Fiber reinforced with End Rod compound
item.angelblock.vesicular_terracotta.des: Can be found in Desert Pyramids
item.angelblock.energy_crystal.desc: When held in hand, grants Speed 4 effect
item.angelblock.flax_fibre.desc: Can be found in Jungle Temples or Woodland Mansions
item.angelblock.strength_pearl.desc1: If in offhand use End Rod to evoke thunder
item.angelblock.strength_pearl.desc2: Can be found in Pillager Outpost, Mineshafts and Dangeons
item.angelblock.bios_diamond.desc1: Using it sets Absorption effect I-V for 2-10 seconds
item.angelblock.bios_diamond.desc2: Can be found in Jungle Temples or drop from Green Diamond Ore blocks
item.angelblock.bios_diamond.desc3: Can be used as an armor trim material
item.angelblock.end_sapphire.desc1: Using it sets a random Levitation effect within [0..50] level for 2-15 seconds
item.angelblock.end_sapphire.desc2: Can be found in End Cities
item.angelblock.flame_stone.desc1: If in offhand use End Rod for clear weather
item.angelblock.flame_stone.desc2: Can be found in Nether Fortresses
item.angelblock.marine_crystal.desc0: If in mainhand use on living beings to remove all effects
item.angelblock.marine_crystal.desc1: If in offhand use End Rod to evoke rain
item.angelblock.marine_crystal.desc3: Can be found in Ocean Ruins
item.angelblock.guardian_eye.desc1: Using it sets Night Vision effect for 1 minute
item.angelblock.guardian_eye.desc2: (The effect disappears when switching an item in hand)
item.angelblock.guardian_eye.desc3: Can drop from killed Elder Guardian (35% chance, +15% for each level of the Looting enchantment)
item.angelblock.miner_figure.desc1: Using it near piglins (16 blocks radius) makes them calm
item.angelblock.miner_figure.desc2: Can be found in Mineshafts and Dangeons
item.angelblock.evoker_amulet.desc2: Allays vanish if far away and not renamed or holding an item
item.angelblock.evoker_amulet.desc3: Can be found in Woodland Mansions
item.angelblock.ancient_scroll.desc: Can be found in Stronghold libraries
item.angelblock.blue_axolotl_bucket.desc: Can be given by a farmer as a gift (1/100 chance) when player has the 'Hero of the Village' status
item.angelblock.green_diamond_ore.desc: Use the Rod of Terra on Diamond Ore to turn it into the Green Diamond Ore
item.angelblock.inactive_angel_block.des: Once active, despawns any monsters within 70 blocks
The Echo Shard is not consumed during activation
item.angelblock.angel_block.desc1: Despawns any monsters in 70 block radius
item.angelblock.angel_block.desc3: After using an item on the block, the block stops removing corresponding monsters:
item.angelblock.angel_block.desc5: Coal: Wither Skeleton           Totem of Undying: Evoker
item.angelblock.angel_block.desc6: Rotten Flesh: Any Zombie        Saddle: Ravager
item.angelblock.angel_block.desc7: Wheat: Zombie Villager          Ender Pearl: Enderman
item.angelblock.angel_block.desc9: Glass Bottle: Witch             Shulker Shell: Shulker
item.angelblock.angel_block.desc11: Spider Eye: Cave Spider        Blaze Rod: Blaze
item.angelblock.angel_block.desc12: Slime Ball: Slime               Fire Charge: Ghast
item.angelblock.angel_block.desc13: Magma Cream: Magma Cube        Prismarine Shard: Guardian
item.angelblock.angel_block.desc14: Gold Nugget: Pigline            Wet Sponge: Elder Guardian
item.angelblock.angel_block.desc15: Gold Ingot: Pigline Brute       Skulk Catalyst: Warden
item.angelblock.angel_block.desc16: Pork Chop: Hoglin              Wither Rose: Wither
item.angelblock.angel_block.desc17: Phantom Membrane: Phantom      End Crystal: Ender Dragon
item.angelblock.angel_block.desc18: Echo Shard: resets the filter - block removes ANY monsters again
item.angelblock.angel_block.desc19: Using the item again will remove the corresponding monster from the filter if it has already been added
item.angelblock.angel_block.desc20: §2The item used on the block is NOT consumed
item.angelblock.angel_block.desc21: The block's color changes depending on the number of monsters added to the filter:
item.angelblock.angel_block.desc22: Dark blue – the block is dormant (does not remove monsters)
item.angelblock.angel_block.desc23: Blue – the filter is empty (the block removes ANY monsters)
item.angelblock.angel_block.desc28: After placement, the block must be activated with an Echo Shard. If more than 4 monsters are added to the filter, the block becomes dormant and must be reactivated with an Echo Shard
item.angelblock.devil_block.desc1: Prevents deaths of monsters in 70 block radius
item.angelblock.devil_block.desc3: Using the items on the block spawns corresponding monster in 30 block radius:
item.angelblock.devil_block.desc6: Rotten Flesh: Zombie           Totem of Undying: Evoker
item.angelblock.devil_block.desc9: Gun Powder: Creeper           Ender Pearl: Enderman
item.angelblock.devil_block.desc12: Spider Eye: Cave Spider       Breeze Rod: Breeze
item.angelblock.devil_block.desc13: Slime Ball: Slime              Blaze Rod: Blaze
item.angelblock.devil_block.desc14: Magma Cream: Magma Cube       Fire Charge: Ghast
item.angelblock.devil_block.desc15: Gold Nugget: Pigline           Phantom Membrane: Phantom
item.angelblock.devil_block.desc16: Gold Ingot: Pigline Brute       Prismarine Shard: Guardian
item.angelblock.devil_block.desc18: §2The item used on the block is consumed!
item.angelblock.devil_block.desc19: The placed block gradually changes surrounding blocks:
item.angelblock.devil_block.desc21: Dirt, Farmland, Dirt Path, Clay → Mud
item.angelblock.devil_block.desc22: Sand → Clay (if under water), End Stone or Terracotta
item.angelblock.devil_block.desc24: Stone → Infested Stone or Mossy Cobblestone
item.angelblock.devil_block.desc25: Cobblestone → Infested Cobblestone or Mossy Cobblestone
item.angelblock.devil_block.desc28: Obsidian → Crying Obsidian or Cracked Obsidian
item.angelblock.devil_block.desc36: Affects blocks within a 18-block horizontal radius, provided there is air, water or a plant above them
item.angelblock.angel_rod_block.desc1: When hold in a hand or placed on a block it despawns any monsters in 20 block radius
item.angelblock.angel_rod_block.desc2: The block can be dropped as source items - player should be sitting when drops
item.angelblock.gunpowder_block.desc: Explodes after falling, hit or fired
item.angelblock.nether_bars_block.desc1: Can be found in Bastion Remnants
item.angelblock.block_breaker_potion_ite: §3§lBrewing Recipe:§r§3 Prismarine Shard, Splash Awkward Potion
White Wool: 2-4 Strings and 0-2 Bone Meals
Destroys diamond armor on armor stand and mobs. Drops Diamond Powder
item.angelblock.soaring_spore_essence.de: Used to grant the armor the ability to highlight the player and enable slow falling
When used on living beings, it applies infinite Glowing and Slow Falling effects
§3§lBrewing Recipe:§r§3 Froglight, Potion of Slow Falling
description.rods.press_shift: §7Press §9Shift§7 to display information about block usage...
description.rods.press_alt: §7Press §9Alt§7 to display information about block transformation...
description.rods.no_magnet_mode: Upgrade the rod to unlock Magnet Mode
description.rods.magnet_mode.ancient_rod: The rod pulls ore blocks to the surface, except for Diamond Ore. Ore can only pass through Stone, Cobblestone, Deepslate, Cobbled Deepslate, Granite, Diorite, Andesite, Tuff. When detecting Diamond Ore, Rails (Abandoned Mineshafts), Sculk, Calcite, and Smooth Basalt (Amethyst Geodes), a distinct sound is played, similar to a metal detector
description.rods.magnet_mode.fire_rod: The rod pulls ore blocks to the surface, except for Diamond Ore. Ore can only pass through Stone, Cobblestone, Deepslate, Cobbled Deepslate, Granite, Diorite, Andesite, Tuff, Netherrack, Basalt, Blackstone, Magma. When detecting Diamond Ore, Rails (Abandoned Mineshafts), Sculk, Calcite, and Smooth Basalt (Amethyst Geodes), a distinct sound is played, similar to a metal detector
